tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results show good glycemic control (HbA1c 5.5%), but mild fasting hypoglycemia (glucose 65.9 mg/dL). Renal function, electrolytes, and lipid panel are mostly within normal limits, except for elevated LDL cholesterol (133.2 mg/dL) and low HDL cholesterol (35.3 mg/dL), indicating increased cardiovascular risk. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend clinical correlation for hypoglycemia and lipid management.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
